description: Italian criminal organization originating from the Antico Corso area of Catania, Sicily. Active since the 1970s, it operated in northern Italy, especially Milan and Turin. The clan is divided into two factions, historically in conflict: the Milanese faction and the Catania faction. It was formed to counter the power of the Catania Mafia families led by Giuseppe Calderone and Benedetto Santapaola.

country_links.evidence_quote: È divenuto noto negli anni '70-'80 per aver avuto basi logistiche ed operative in Nord Italia , soprattutto a Milano e Torino
country_links.context: The clan had logistical and operational bases in Milan and Turin, and carried out murders and drug trafficking there.
